                        +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------[  Service Layer  ]+
                        | +-----------------------------[  Data Layer  ]+                                                         |
                        | |                                             |    +-----------------+                                  |
                        | |                                           +-o----+  Order Service  |<------+                          |
+--------------------+  | |                                           | |    +-----------------+       |      +----------------+  |  +---------------+
|  Response Builder  |<+o |  /------------\                           | |                              +------+  User Service  |<-o--+  API Gateway  |
+--------------------+ || | ++  Order DB  |<--------------------------+ |                              |      +----------------+  |  +---------------+
                       || | |\------------/                             |                              |                          |
                       +o-o-+                                           |                              |                          |
                        | | |                            /-----------\  |                              |                          |
                        | | +----------------------------+  User DB  |<-o------------------------------+                          |
                        | |                              \-----------/  |                                                         |
                        | |                                             |                                                         |
                        | |                                             |                                                         |
                        | |                                             |                                                         |
                        | +---------------------------------------------+                                                         |
